query:
SELECT a.id, a.data, a.status, u.name as corretor_name, u.equipeId 
FROM agendamentos a 
JOIN users u ON a.corretorId = u.id 
ORDER BY a.data 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT a.id, a.data, a.status, u.name as corretor_name, u.equipeId 
FROM agendamentos a 
JOIN users u ON a.corretorId = u.id
